title: Windows Service Installed from Event Logs
description: Detects service installation through System Event ID 7045 or Security Event ID 4697, with emphasis on service binaries in writable locations.
query: (('Log Source' = 'Windows Event System Logs' and 'Event ID' = '7045') or (('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4697')) and ('Service File Name' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*\\ProgramData\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*powershell*' or msg like '*Service File Name*') | stats count as ServiceInstalls, unique('Service Name') as Services, unique('Service File Name') as ServiceBinaries by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -ServiceInstalls
falsepositives: Legitimate software installation or endpoint management agent deployment

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4697(S) A service was installed in the system
